EDIT LOG

Like 10 mins later I always fuck up the you/them perspective so I'm not being lazy and fixing it 'cause like I love y'all. (Upd. 2) Tried making it more token-light, I dunno somethin' just feels off. Make sure to start a new chat if you want the above perspective fixes.

8/19/24 Removed the description of each race - it seemed to be causing users difficulties (i.e. bot labeling people races they weren't) so I just decided - fuck it - and trashed it.
